title: Cobblemon Nova
description: The New Cobblemon Experience, Made For Hardcore And Own Nuzlocke Rules
body: Want to show your support for me and the development of Cobblemon Nova? Check out BisectHosting and use the THRN for a 25% discount on your first month of a gaming server as a new customer. With their 24/7 support and quick response times, you can count on excellent assistance for all your gaming requirements This Pack was made to play on hardcore mode with some rules being Hardcore Rules - When you die, You restart, You lose all of your pokemon, team and pc - You can only use the healer once every minecraft day Nuzlocke Rules - When your pokemon dies its dead forever and you cant get it again - You can only get 1 of every pokemon, if you kill it in battle or it flees you cant get it again - If its a shiny and you already have or killed that pokemon you cant get it again - No items in player battles - pokemon dying in player battles do count as dead forever Minecraft Rules - No iron farm - No duping - No copper farm - No gold farm Cobblemon Rules - Everyone needs to pick a starter from different regions They can and will change later on
